user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=balanced, share_min_soc_frac=0.5, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Islanded with declining SoC; r4c4 in urgent distress (SoC 15–30% below threshold); r3c5 maintaining 50.5% floor and rejecting transfers. Adopt balanced sharing: prioritize r4c4 urgent requests up to 0.25 kW/tick to prevent peer cascade failure, but hold 50% SoC reserve to match peer safety norms. Reciprocal pattern established; expect recovery when grid reconnects..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
